title: Pfizer — Contacts
html:
Pfizer Contact Map & Relationship Intelligence

Governing Thought

The Pfizer relationship is anchored in the Vaccines commercial organization through three established brand-level contacts (Antonietta Forte, Gabby Gonzalez, Tim Douglas) and one emerging above-brand connector (Aimee Renaud in AI Excellence). Unlike J&J's centralized Insights org, Pfizer's brand teams operate independently — each brand has its own marketing lead who controls vendor decisions, making franchise-level selling impossible. Growth requires brand-by-brand entry through warm introductions. The contact map today is narrow (vaccines-only) but strategically positioned: established contacts on three of four vaccine sub-brands, with clear referral paths into primary care and specialty care through Aimee Renaud, Josh Stewart, and the existing vaccine champions.

Pfizer Commercial Organization (Relevant Structure)

Pfizer US Commercial Division
  |
  |--- Primary Care
  |      |--- Vaccines
  |      |      |--- Abrysvo OA --- Antonietta Forte (Director, BAI)
  |      |      |--- Abrysvo Maternal --- Tim Douglas
  |      |      |      (formerly Lisa Dixon — departed, was key champion)
  |      |      |--- Prevnar Adult --- Tim Douglas / Lisa Godek
  |      |      |--- Prevnar Peds --- Stephanie Archer
  |      |      |--- Trumenba/Penbraya (Meningococcal) --- Gabby Gonzalez
  |      |      |--- Global Vaccines --- Renata Alves
  |      |--- Paxlovid --- Gavin Hansen
  |      |--- Nurtec --- [Contact TBD]
  |      |--- Eliquis --- [Contact TBD]
  |
  |--- Specialty Care
  |      |--- Xeljanz --- [Contact TBD]
  |      |--- Vyndaquel --- [Contact TBD]
  |
  |--- Oncology (Seagen Integration)
  |      |--- Ibrance, Xtandi, Padcev, Adcetris, Lorbrena, Tukysa, Inlyta
  |      |--- [No ZoomRx contacts yet]
  |
  |--- Above Brand / Cross-Functional
         |--- AI Excellence --- Aimee Renaud
         |--- Rare Disease --- Josh Stewart
         |--- Obesity --- Candace Anderson

Note: Pfizer's org chart is reconstructed from AO plan and project data. Full reporting lines and titles above Director level are not yet mapped. [Populate from LinkedIn research and AO team debriefs.]

Tier 1: Established Contacts (Active Business)

These are contacts with whom ZoomRx has active projects and regular interaction. They are the foundation of the Pfizer relationship.

Vaccines — Abrysvo OA

Name Title Email Working Style
Antonietta Forte Director, Business Analytics & Insights, Vaccines [Populate from project SOW/email] Established relationship through Abrysvo OA PET. Decision maker on Abrysvo OA work. Brand-level budget authority. [Populate working style notes from next interaction.]

Vaccines — Abrysvo Maternal & Prevnar

Name Title Email Working Style
Tim Douglas [Title TBD — likely Director/Sr. Manager, Vaccines Insights] [Populate from project SOW/email] Repeat buyer — owns Abrysvo Maternal (PET, HCPP, Digital Tracking) and Prevnar Adult (HCPP signed). Key upsell target for ATU and PET on his brands. Trusted enough to ask for referrals to adjacent brand teams (Nurtec, COVID). Previously responsible for referring work; filling gap left by Lisa Dixon.

Vaccines — Meningococcal

Name Title Email Working Style
Gabby Gonzalez [Title TBD — likely Manager/Director, Meningococcal Marketing Insights] [Populate from project SOW/email] Established contact running Trumenba/Penbraya HCPP. Digital Tracking is in active discussion and nearly closed. Natural candidate for PET pilot pitch. [Populate working style notes from next interaction.]

Tier 2: Warm Contacts (In Development)

These contacts are known to the AO team but do not yet have active ZoomRx projects. They represent the next layer of relationship development.

Above Brand

Name Title Email What They Care About
Aimee Renaud Pfizer AI Excellence [Populate] Above-brand role focused on AI adoption across Pfizer. Key connector — can introduce ZoomRx to any brand team by framing HCPP as an AI-powered insights tool. Currently engaged via Message Labs project (AI Migraine Messaging Pilot). Critical relationship: Aimee is the only above-brand contact and the primary referral path into non-vaccine brands (Nurtec, Xeljanz, Vyndaquel).

Vaccines — Prevnar Peds

Name Title Email What They Care About
Stephanie Archer [Title TBD — Prevnar Peds marketing/insights] [Populate] Already pitched on HCPP. Follow up with Abrysvo Maternal HCPP results as proof point. Verilogue is the incumbent on her brand — displacement requires demonstrating superior output (AI analysis, actionable recommendations).

Vaccines — Prevnar Adults

Name Title Email What They Care About
Lisa Godek [Title TBD — Prevnar Adults contact] [Populate] Co-decision maker on Prevnar Adult alongside Tim Douglas. Relationship status less clear than Tim's. [Populate from next interaction.]

Vaccines — Global

Name Title Email What They Care About
Renata Alves Global Vaccines [Populate] Shared global capabilities deck with ZoomRx. Global deals are slower and harder to close but represent significant revenue if landed. Maintain relationship for long-term play.

Primary Care

Name Title Email What They Care About
Gavin Hansen [Title TBD — Paxlovid] [Populate] Warm contact via mutual referral. First-priority target for Paxlovid HCPP ($75K opportunity). Paxlovid has complex patient decision-making (fear of COVID vs. drug concerns) that HCPP illuminates.
Candace Anderson [Title TBD — Obesity] [Populate] Warm but early-stage. Pfizer's obesity pipeline is still developing — not a near-term revenue play. Monitor for when portfolio matures.

Specialty / Rare Disease

Name Title Email What They Care About
Josh Stewart [Title TBD — Rare Disease] [Populate] Warm contact. Potential referral path to Vyndaquel (transthyretin amyloid cardiomyopathy — rare cardiac condition) and possibly other specialty brands.

Tier 3: Decision Makers (Known but Not Contacted)

These are brand-level decision makers identified from project history. ZoomRx does not yet have a direct relationship.

Brand Decision Maker Current Activity Incumbent Path to Relationship
Abrysvo Maternal Tim Douglas PET, HCPP, Digital Tracking Sermo (ATU) Established
Prevnar Adults Tim Douglas / Lisa Godek Signed HCPP (FY26) -- Established / Warm
Abrysvo OA Antonietta Forte PET N/A Established
Trumenba/Penbraya Gabby Gonzalez HCPP + discussing tracking -- Established
Prevnar Peds Stephanie Archer Pitched HCPP Verilogue Warm
Paxlovid Gavin Hansen Referred by mutual contact -- Warm
Global Vaccines Renata Alves Shared global capes -- Warm
Nurtec [Unknown] No contact [Unknown] Via Tim Douglas or Aimee Renaud
Xeljanz [Unknown] No contact [Unknown] Via Aimee Renaud or Josh Stewart
Vyndaquel [Unknown] No contact [Unknown] Via Josh Stewart or Aimee Renaud
Ibrance/Padcev/Lorbrena [Unknown] No contact [Unknown] Requires oncology contact development
Eliquis [Unknown] No contact [Unknown] Low priority — mature brand

Lost Champion — Lisa Dixon

Who: Lisa Dixon was the Abrysvo Maternal contact and ZoomRx's best champion at Pfizer Vaccines.

What happened: Lisa left her role (circumstances unknown — departure or internal move). She was responsible for:

  • Referring ZoomRx to other Pfizer Vaccines teams
  • Exploring new ZoomRx offerings beyond HCPP
  • Being the internal advocate for ZoomRx capabilities

Impact: Her departure removed the most active referral engine on the account. Tim Douglas has absorbed some of her Abrysvo Maternal responsibilities, but the proactive advocacy for ZoomRx across the vaccines franchise has not been replaced.

Mitigation: Build Aimee Renaud (AI Excellence) into a comparable above-brand champion. Aimee can open doors that Lisa opened through a different mechanism (AI credibility vs. project results).

Relationship Intelligence

Working Style Do's and Don'ts

DO:

  • Lead with brand-specific results — Pfizer brands operate independently; showing Abrysvo results to Nurtec is helpful for credibility but the Nurtec team will judge ZoomRx on whether HCPP solves their problem
  • Respect independent brand budgets — no franchise deals; each brand is a separate sale, budget, and decision maker
  • Use Aimee Renaud strategically — she is the only above-brand connector; frame requests to her as AI-forward initiatives, not routine vendor introductions
  • Ask established contacts for referrals explicitly — Tim Douglas is the best candidate: "Is there a colleague on another brand who might benefit from this?"
  • Lead with HCPP on new brands — it's lower cost ($50-75K), novel, AI-forward, quick to deliver, and hard to say no to
  • Emphasize ZoomRx's AI reputation — Pfizer already sees ZoomRx as AI pioneers through the Abrysvo PET AI work; reinforce this in every interaction

DON'T:

  • Don't attempt top-down selling — Aimee Renaud can open doors but cannot mandate adoption; each marketing lead decides independently
  • Don't try to sell franchise-level packages — brands are structured independently; bundle pricing only works within a single brand's scope
  • Don't assume warm contacts are ready to buy — Gavin Hansen, Josh Stewart, and Candace Anderson are referral-level warm, not decision-ready
  • Don't neglect the Lisa Dixon gap — the loss of a champion is a relationship vulnerability; actively build replacement advocates
  • Don't underestimate marketing leads — at Pfizer, they hold significant sway and are very involved in vendor decisions; treating them as secondary to insights/analytics contacts (the J&J model) will not work here

Meeting Cadences

Cadence Contacts
Regular project meetings Tim Douglas, Gabby Gonzalez, Antonietta Forte (frequency varies by project phase)
Quarterly or ad hoc Aimee Renaud (above-brand), Stephanie Archer (Prevnar Peds follow-up)
As needed Lisa Godek, Gavin Hansen, Josh Stewart, Candace Anderson, Renata Alves

[Populate exact cadences from project team — Rich Durante/Nick Fleischman will have current meeting schedules.]

Relationship Building Priorities for FY26

High Priority — Invest Now

Contact Why
Aimee Renaud Only above-brand contact. AI Excellence role gives her visibility across all Pfizer brands. The Message Labs project (AI Migraine Messaging Pilot) is a live proof point of ZoomRx's AI capabilities beyond vaccines. If this relationship deepens, she becomes the replacement for Lisa Dixon as the cross-brand advocate.
Tim Douglas Repeat buyer with the most active project portfolio (Abrysvo Maternal + Prevnar Adult). He is the primary referral source for new vaccine brand contacts and the top upsell target for ATU on his brands.
Gavin Hansen Warm referral — first-priority entry into Paxlovid ($75K HCPP opportunity). This is the shortest path to filling the "$125K other brands" gap in the AO plan.

Medium Priority — Maintain and Deepen

Contact Why
Gabby Gonzalez Digital Tracking nearly closed. Once that converts, she becomes a multi-service contact. Natural PET pilot candidate.
Antonietta Forte Established but single-project (Abrysvo OA PET). Upsell to HCPP and ATU on her brand.
Stephanie Archer Already pitched on Prevnar Peds HCPP. Verilogue displacement requires superior proof points — deliver Abrysvo Maternal HCPP results first, then re-engage.

Watch List — Monitor for Opportunity

Contact Why
Josh Stewart Rare disease path to Vyndaquel. Low urgency but high strategic value if the connection materializes.
Renata Alves Global vaccines is a long-cycle play. Maintain relationship for when global scope discussions arise.
Candace Anderson Pfizer obesity pipeline is early-stage. No near-term revenue but could become significant if Pfizer launches an obesity product.
Nurtec marketing lead Unknown contact. Second-priority for the "$125K other brands" bucket. Pursue intro via Tim Douglas or Aimee Renaud.

Contact Map Gaps (Action Items)

The following information is missing and should be populated as it becomes available:

  • Full names and titles for all warm contacts (Gavin Hansen, Stephanie Archer, Josh Stewart, Candace Anderson, Renata Alves, Lisa Godek)
  • Email addresses for all contacts
  • Pfizer org chart above Director level — who do Tim Douglas, Gabby Gonzalez, and Antonietta Forte report to?
  • Nurtec marketing lead identification
  • Oncology (Seagen integration) contact identification — needed for long-term expansion per AO plan
  • Aimee Renaud's reporting line and AI Excellence team structure
  • Working style notes for all contacts (capture from first/next interactions)

[Populate from AO plan updates, Kimble project data, LinkedIn research, and upcoming client interactions.]

Back to Accounts Hub | Home
